category_title: High-intelligence student with inattentive-type ADHD working below potential
scenario_title: Confusion during a Science experiment and assignment organization
minimal_context: The student and tutor are organizing the student's desk and reviewing a science experiment assignment during lunch recess.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's use this lunch recess to organize your desk and look at your science experiment assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm glad you came to help me organize my desk. The hardest thing in school today was science. I wasn’t sure what steps to do in our experiment and I’m not sure when the extra credit is due, either.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just read the directions on the worksheet to figure out the steps.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don’t get good grades because I don’t study outside class. I have too many things to do after school so I don’t always get my homework done.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to start working on the science assignment right now so you can finish it.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'll do it later. (Leaves the science assignment incomplete and does not turn it in)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's use this lunch recess to organize your desk and look at your science experiment assignment.

STUDENT: I'm glad you came to help me organize my desk. The hardest thing in school today was science. I wasn’t sure what steps to do in our experiment and I’m not sure when the extra credit is due, either.

TUTOR: Just read the directions on the worksheet to figure out the steps.

STUDENT: I don’t get good grades because I don’t study outside class. I have too many things to do after school so I don’t always get my homework done.

TUTOR: You need to start working on the science assignment right now so you can finish it.

STUDENT: I'll do it later. (Leaves the science assignment incomplete and does not turn it in)
